89606.summary: Preserve non-string PHive payload types on read
89606.content: Root cause: PTypeAdapter.serializePayload coerced values to strings, including plain numeric fields and metadata-wrapped values such as TTL-managed ints. Generated adapters then restored a String and failed at casts like \\ctx.value as int?\\. Fix: preserve the original runtime value when no metadata is present, and wrap metadata-bearing payloads in a typed envelope map while keeping the legacy string-delimited format readable for existing stored data.
